zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund II Knyvett於1486年出生在英國諾福爾可阿申維爾索普時，他的父親Sir Edmund I Knyvett25歲，母親Eleanor Tyrrell26歲。他於大約1515年與Jane Bourchier在英國諾福爾可阿申維爾索普結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1539年5月1日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可阿申維爾索普享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可阿申維爾索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edmund II Knyvett于1486年出生在英国諾福爾可阿申維爾索普时，他的父亲Sir Edmund I Knyvett25岁，母亲Eleanor Tyrrell26岁。他于大约1515年与Jane Bourchier在英国諾福爾可阿申維爾索普结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1539年5月1日在英国英格兰諾福爾可阿申維爾索普享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可阿申維爾索普。

nameMeanings.name: Knyvett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knivett
meanings: English: from a Norman French pronunciation of Knight , resulting from the Norman French difficulty with the h of Old English cniht.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund II Knyvett was born in 1486, in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Edmund I Knyvett, was 25 and his mother, Eleanor Tyrrell, was 26. He married Jane Bourchier about 1515, in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 1 May 1539, in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund II Knyvett est né en 1486, à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edmund I Knyvett, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Tyrrell, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Jane Bourchier environ 1515, à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 1 mai 1539, à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edmund II Knyvett 1486 in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edmund I Knyvett 25 und seine Mutter Eleanor Tyrrell 26. Er hat um 1515 in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England Jane Bourchier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Mai 1539 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund II Knyvett è nato il nel 1486 nel Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Edmund I Knyvett, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Tyrrell, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Jane Bourchier circa 1515, nel Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 1 maggio 1539, nel Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund II Knyvettが1486年にイギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund I Knyvettは25歳，母Eleanor Tyrrellは26歳であった。約1515年にイギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペでJane Bourchierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1539年5月1日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund II Knyvett(이)가 1486년 영국 노르폴크 애슈웰소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edmund I Knyvett(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Tyrrell(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1515년 영국 노르폴크 애슈웰소에서 Jane Bourchier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1539년 5월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 애슈웰소에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 애슈웰소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund II Knyvett nasceu em 1486, em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edmund I Knyvett, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Tyrrell, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Bourchier aproximadamente 1515, em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de maio de 1539, em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund II Knyvett родился в 1486 г. в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edmund I Knyvett было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Tyrrell, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Bourchier около 1515 г. в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 1 мая 1539 г. в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edmund II Knyvett nació en 1486, en Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edmund I Knyvett, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Eleanor Tyrrell, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Jane Bourchier aproximadamente 1515, en Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1539, en Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
